questions.text:
1. Why is having a roommate good?

  1. Because I can save money
  2. Because I can drink their milk

2. Why is having a roommate bad?

  1. Because they might be noisy
  2. Because they make me tea

3. What can you practice with your roommate?

  1. I can practice talking about my routine
  2. I can practice using the microwave

4. Why is a briefing helpful?

  1. We can talk about preferences and requests
  2. We can play games

Which is the best way to ask?

  1. Message me before guests come
  2. Could you message me before guests come?
